config.script:
"""
	Written By: Sagar Iparkar
	Written Date: 25/07/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Get Painting Images Area Wise 
	"""	
	
	params = {'MST_Area_Id':self.params.AreaId,'MST_PaintingType_Id':self.params.MST_PaintingType_Id}	
	system.perspective.print("Masking params "+str(params))
#	params = {'MST_Area_Id':26,'MST_PaintingType_Id':2}				
	dsResult = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/Painting/getPaintingAreaWiswImages",params)
	
	self.custom.imageCount=len(dsResult)
	self.getChild("root").getChild("lblTotalNoOfStep").props.text="Total No Step "+ str(self.custom.imageCount)
	self.custom.currentCount =1
	self.custom.dsPainting=dsResult
	if self.custom.imageCount > 0:
		ImageName=dsResult[self.custom.currentCount-1]['ImageName']
		ImagePath=dsResult[self.custom.currentCount-1]['ImagePath']
		self.getChild("root").getChild("imgMasking").props.source=ImagePath
	#	for i in dsResult:
	#		print i['ImageName']
	#		print i['ImagePath']
	else:
		self.custom.imageCount=0
		self.custom.currentCount =0

"""
	Written By: Sagar Iparkar
	Written Date: 25/07/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Complete Image demasking operation. 
	"""
	try:
		self.props.enabled=False
		dsResult=self.view.custom.dsPainting
		if self.view.custom.imageCount > self.view.custom.currentCount:
			self.view.custom.currentCount =self.view.custom.currentCount+1	
			ImageName=dsResult[self.view.custom.currentCount-1]['ImageName']
			ImagePath=dsResult[self.view.custom.currentCount-1]['ImagePath']
			self.getSibling("imgMasking").props.source=ImagePath
			
		else:
			system.perspective.closePopup('')
			
		from threading import Timer
		def runThisLater():
		   self.props.enabled=True
		Timer(2.0, runThisLater).start()
	except:
		screenName ='PopUp Masking Painting'   
		self.props.enabled=True
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/PopUp Masking Painting')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> Next Button')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

try:
		dsResult=self.view.custom.dsPainting
		if self.view.custom.imageCount > self.view.custom.currentCount
			self.view.custom.currentCount =self.view.custom.currentCount+1	
			ImageName=dsResult[self.view.custom.currentCount-1]['ImageName']
			ImagePath=dsResult[self.view.custom.currentCount-1]['ImagePath']
			self.getSibling("imgMasking").props.source=ImagePath

		else:
			system.perspective.closePopup('')
	except:
		screenName ='PopUp Masking Painting'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/PopUp Masking Painting')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> Next Button')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block
